partnerSkill.name: Fluffy Shield
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Cat Helper
partnerSkill.description: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by (100~200). (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Egg Layer
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Lifmunk Recoil
partnerSkill.description: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.

partnerSkill.name: Surfing Slam
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

partnerSkill.name: Fire Tackle
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

partnerSkill.name: Dig Here!
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Zephyr Glider
partnerSkill.description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

partnerSkill.name: Jolt Glider
partnerSkill.description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

partnerSkill.name: Fluffy Wool
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Leap Stance
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by (50~86)%.

partnerSkill.name: Shadow Stance
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Herbil Pulse
partnerSkill.description: While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore (30~60)% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.

partnerSkill.name: Soothing Shower
partnerSkill.description: While in party, restores (20~40)% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) (120-second cooldown after activation)

partnerSkill.name: Logging Assistance
partnerSkill.description: While in party, improves logging efficiency by (30~50)% and reduces weight of all types of wood by (40~60)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Best Boy
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Happy Clover
partnerSkill.description: While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Jolt Bomb
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Electric explosion upon impact.

partnerSkill.name: Cold Bomb
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Ice explosion upon impact.

partnerSkill.name: Caffeine Inoculation
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by (100~900)%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Pengullet Launcher
partnerSkill.description: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

partnerSkill.name: Pengullet Lux Launcher
partnerSkill.description: When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

partnerSkill.name: Brave Sailor
partnerSkill.description: While in party, Fire Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Unyielding Storm Commander
partnerSkill.description: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Water damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Dark Knowledge
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Pacapaca Wool
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Kingpaca 's Defense and Movement Speed. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: King of Muscles
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

partnerSkill.name: Coldhearted King
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

partnerSkill.name: Dream Chaser

partnerSkill.name: Magma Tears

partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Defense of Fire Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Icy Whispers

partnerSkill.name: Huggy Frost

partnerSkill.name: Fried Killamari
partnerSkill.description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

partnerSkill.description: While in party, improves player mining efficiency by (30~60)% and reduces Stone weight by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted and increases lumbering efficiency by (220~500)%.

partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While at a base, increases the Lumbering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.description: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores (100~200) Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: King of Fluff
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (12~24)% for each Swee in party.

partnerSkill.name: Winter Trapeze
partnerSkill.description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables slow ascension while gliding.

partnerSkill.description: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Grass damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack) Increases efficiency by (200~400)% when working at a Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, or other related facilities.

partnerSkill.name: Jelliette Drop
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases items obtained from fishing by (55~95)%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jelliette 's watering speed increases by (50~120)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Jellroy Drop
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases items obtained from salvaging by (55~95)%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy 's watering speed increases by (50~120)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Cephalo-Princess
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Defense of Water Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Spirit Fire. When this Pal uses Spirit Fire, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by (10~20)%.

partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by (20~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a mount. This Pal's Attack increases by (4~8)% for each other Fire or Ground Pal in your party.

partnerSkill.name: Ice Overload
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Ice damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Samba Step
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (155~240)% while mounted on grass.

partnerSkill.name: Drill Crusher
partnerSkill.description: When activated, enters the Shell Spin state. Follows the player while spinning, increasing ore mining efficiency by (800~2000)%.

partnerSkill.name: Love's First Blossom
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a (35~45)% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Purity's Full Bloom
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a (45~55)% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Soil Improver
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Attack of Ground Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Golden Harvest
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases amount of Gold Coin dropped by enemies by +(100~200)%. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, with a small chance to drop Gold Coin. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Balmy Weather
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in your base, increases the egg production speed of Pals assigned to Breeding Farm by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Wolf of the Sun
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Ice damage and are immune to Freeze. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Gloomhowl
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Dark damage and are immune to Blind. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Hellflame Lion
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, Grass Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Darkflame Lion
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, Neutral Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Cast-Iron Shell
partnerSkill.description: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within (5~9) seconds. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Fullmetal Shell
partnerSkill.description: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within (5~9) seconds. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Peacock Pounce
partnerSkill.description: While in party, Frostplume 's icy aura sharpens focus, increasing the player's reload speeds by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Phantasmal Arcana
partnerSkill.description: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy creates flames around itself, dealing continuous damage equal to (15~30)% of the player's attack damage to enemies that come into contact with them. (Does not stack.)

partnerSkill.name: Silk Shroud
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Blizzard Spike. When this Pal uses Blizzard Spike, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Gilded Shroud
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Defense of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Messenger of Death
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, all Party Pals' Active Skill cooldowns are reduced by (30~60)% whenever you defeat an enemy. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Rampant Spores
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Sometimes drops Mushroom or Cavern Mushroom when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Roiling Spores
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases by (10~15)%.

partnerSkill.name: Witch's Icy Veil
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Icelyn changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

partnerSkill.name: Resurrection
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, when Gildra is incapacitated, it revives with its Hunger reduced to 0.

partnerSkill.name: Stormbringer Sea Dragon
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Soak by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Stormbringer Lava Dragon
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, nullifies lava damage and increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Burn by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Wings of Flame
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku)

partnerSkill.name: Wings of Water
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku Aqua)

partnerSkill.name: Sand Sprint
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (50~100)% while mounted on sand.

partnerSkill.name: Sky Dragon Affection
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases Attack of Dragon Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Grass Dragon Affection
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Grass and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

partnerSkill.name: Floral Boost
partnerSkill.description: While at a base, Lullu fills farms with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops by (50~70)%.

partnerSkill.name: Sandball Soccer
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Defense of Ground Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Birds of a Feather
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While fighting together, (15~30)% increased chance of encountering pals with the same Passive Skill as this Pal. (Excludes certain Passive Skills)

partnerSkill.name: Fish Fillet
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Skutlass becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2600~3900)). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

partnerSkill.name: Seared Fish Fillet
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Skutlass Ignis becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2900~4200)). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass Ignis will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

partnerSkill.name: Ore-Loving Beast
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by (30~60)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Ice-Loving Beast
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by (35~65)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Night Dancer
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Boosts jumping ability while mounted. This Pal's movement speed increases by +(50~100)% at night.

partnerSkill.name: Light Dancer
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Boosts Jump Power while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. (Excluding Starryon Primo)

partnerSkill.name: Power Stone
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Muddy by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Power Crystal
partnerSkill.description: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Dragon damage. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Dragon Hunter
partnerSkill.description: While in party, Dragon Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Explosive Strength
partnerSkill.description: While in party, when attacking enemy weak point, increases the power of the next weak point attack by (30~60)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Invisible Eye
partnerSkill.description: While in party, reduces the chance of being detected by enemies. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Guardian of the Snowy Mountain
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While at a base, increases the Transporting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Guardian of the South
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Ground damage and are immune to Muddy status. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Grave Robber
partnerSkill.description: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Neutral damage. (Does not stack) Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkill.name: Entangling Tongue
partnerSkill.description: While in party, when the player performs a dodge roll or dodge step, Carnibora creates a whirlwind that deals damage to enemies it touches (Grass / Power: (40~80)). (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Magma Kaiser
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by (5~10)% whenever you defeat an enemy. This effect lasts 20 seconds and stacks up to five times.

partnerSkill.name: Dragon Kaiser
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dragon damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Forest Laser
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith fires a powerful Grass laser from its right hand.

partnerSkill.name: Corruption Laser
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith Noct fires a powerful Dark laser from its right hand.

partnerSkill.name: Guardian of the Desert
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Anubis changes the player's attack type to Ground and increases Attack by (30~50)%. Occasionally evades attacks with a flash sidestep during battle.

partnerSkill.name: Desert Empress
partnerSkill.description: While at base, boosts Anubis 's work speed by (20~40)%. Increases efficiency by (30~60)% if Sekhmet is also working at a Workbench, Workshop, or other related facilities. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Phantom Venom
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Poison by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Scorpion Longwave
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Prixter Lux changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

partnerSkill.name: Masonry Archelon
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden While at a base, increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Stone-Chaser Archelon
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the durability of all weapons and armor by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Shot-Nyan Mode
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Nyafia will fire a shotgun at nearby enemies for a limited time. While in party, increases the player's shotgun damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Master of Unlocking
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Mimog can open treasure chests without using a key.

partnerSkill.name: Unknown Invader
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases the damage of the last bullet fired from a full-auto weapon by (100~160)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Unknown Intruder
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the player's energy weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Prayer for Abundant Harvest
partnerSkill.description: While at a base, Prunelia 's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest by (18~35)%.

partnerSkill.name: Soul Collector
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Pals drop +(100~200)% more Pal Souls when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Soul Binder
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Defense of Grass Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Dig, Smokie! Dig!
partnerSkill.description: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, Chromite acquisition increases by +(100~200)%.

partnerSkill.name: Cryo Instincts
partnerSkill.description: While at a base, increases the Cooling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Masquerade Dance
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Party Pals' EXP gained by (40~80)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Chilled Whale Cruiser
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigames start with the capture gauge increased by (5~14)%. Additionally, while the bars overlap, capture progress increases by (5~14)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Cozy Whale Cruiser
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigame begins with the capture gauge (7~17)% higher than usual, and capture progress increases by (7~17)% while the bars overlap. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Grassland Gymnast
partnerSkill.description: While in party, grants 1 additional jump and 1 additional mid-air dash. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Blade of Uncontrolled Passion
partnerSkill.description: While in party, the amount of items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver increases by (100~200)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Sandstorm's Blessing
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ground and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

partnerSkill.name: Homeward Prayer
partnerSkill.description: When activated, teleports to the nearest base. Cannot be used inside dungeons or similar areas.

partnerSkill.name: Yokozuna's Presence
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Electric damage and are immune to Electrify. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Blessing of Purification
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increases by (2~6)% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. When in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by (0.15~0.75)% per second. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Blessing of Chaos
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, the Pal fighting alongside you gradually loses Health in exchange for (40~80)% Attack increase. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Black Ankylosaur
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases the damage dealt to ores by (1100~3300)%, and you can obtain (150~300)% more Ore while mounted.

partnerSkill.name: Steel Guardian Mode
partnerSkill.description: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem 's Attack by (50~200)% and Defense by (50~200)% for a limited time.

partnerSkill.name: Iron Guardian Mode
partnerSkill.description: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem Ignis 's Attack by (60~210)% and Defense by (60~210)% for a limited time.

partnerSkill.name: Aegis Shield
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces shield regeneration delay by (30~60)% and reduces damage taken by your shield by (65~80)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Plasma Dash
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Grants Air Dash, to move at even higher speeds.

partnerSkill.name: Big Stretch
partnerSkill.description: While in party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player, making them more floaty while jumping and falling. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Charging Shell
partnerSkill.description: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Electrify (2~6). (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Grounding Shell
partnerSkill.description: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Water damage, and are immune to Soak. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Fuzzy Fairy
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Friend of Earth
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases the player's Defense by (50~65)% while sprinting. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Void-Dweller
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases the player's damage dealt to enemies that are not in combat by (50~100)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Chillswitch
partnerSkill.description: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Electrify, the enemy discharges electricity, dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

partnerSkill.name: Grinning Death
partnerSkill.description: While in party, attacking enemies afflicted with Poison reduces their Attack by (40~80)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Charming Fish
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Shocking Fish
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)%. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Long-Sleeved Hurray
partnerSkill.description: While in party, reduces the Partner Skill cooldowns for other party Pals by (10~50)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Liberated Pterosaur
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by (2~6)% for each other Dragon or Dark Pal in your party.

partnerSkill.name: Resentful Pterosaur
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by (2~6)% or each other Dragon or Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Eidrolon Ignis)

partnerSkill.name: Electro-Massage Incubation
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes to incubate eggs by (20~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Flower Dance
partnerSkill.description: While in party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Burning Future
partnerSkill.description: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy explodes, dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

partnerSkill.name: Glorious Mist
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Soak (2~6). (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Trick-Loving Fluffle
partnerSkill.description: While in party, when the player's Health falls below 50%, Dupin generates an explosion around the player (Fire / Power: (100~200) / Burn buildup: 777). Additionally, while the player's Health is below 50%, the player's Attack is increased by (30~50)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Dark-Nester
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Blind by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Snake's Sagacity
partnerSkill.description: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Blind (2~6). (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Charming Spore
partnerSkill.description: While at a base, increases the Medicine Production Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Lantern Enchantment
partnerSkill.description: While in party, the player's arrows explode on contact, dealing additional damage equal to (15~30)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Hidden Dark Energy
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases Defense of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Untainted Maiden
partnerSkill.description: While in party, increases the player's Attack by (30~80)% if all Pals in party are different species. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Stage Combat
partnerSkill.description: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Burn (2~6). (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Indestructible Fortress
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (60~80)% less damage from explosive attacks, and are immune to Stun. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.

partnerSkill.name: Harvest Goddess

partnerSkill.name: Goddess of the Tranquil Light
partnerSkill.description: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by (85~95)%.

partnerSkill.name: Ferocious Thunder Dragon
partnerSkill.description: While in party, hitting an enemy with a bullet increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by (1~5)% for 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 30 times. (Does not stack.)

partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Ice Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Tidal Predator
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Fire Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Modified DNA
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. Enhances Dark attacks by (15~30)% while mounted.

partnerSkill.name: Celestial Darkness
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, enhances Neutral and Dark attacks by (15~30)%.

partnerSkill.name: Blizzard Crash

partnerSkill.name: Azure Sovereign
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack increases by (4~8)% for each other Dragon Pal in your party.

partnerSkill.name: Spore Stalwart
partnerSkill.description: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Ivy-Covered, the enemy explodes, dealing additional damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack) Also grants immunity to the World Tree's Explosive Spores to both the player and their Pals.

partnerSkill.name: Mist Stalwart
partnerSkill.description: When activated, the player's attacks inflict Poison (2~6). While in party, grants the player and party Pals immunity to Poison, and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area. (Does not stack)

partnerSkill.name: Icy Steed

partnerSkill.name: Black Steed

partnerSkill.name: Sentinel of the Great Sea

partnerSkill.name: Aerial Missile
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.
